app_info.subtitle: Triage service work
app_info.description: Classic Fireplace ServiceOps helps internal operators search cached customer records, review open service requests, inspect work order summaries, check visible technician schedule context, and queue operator-reviewed service opportunity requests. Striven and Google Apps Script remain the systems of record; the ChatGPT app uses safe Supabase-backed business tools and audit logging.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches cached customer rows in Supabase and does not create or update records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, merge, revoke access, send messages, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns cached customer, location, request, and work order summaries without changing them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, merge, or approve customer records.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists cached open ServiceOps requests from Supabase without changing request state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not send, schedule, publish, or modify external services.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not close, cancel, delete, or overwrite service requests.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves a cached work order summary without updating Striven or Supabase work order rows.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not change public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, close, cancel, or dispatch work orders.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns only cached technician schedule events marked visible to ServiceOps.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not create, update, invite, message, or publish calendar events.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete events, overwrite schedules, or revoke access.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can insert a pending opportunity-request row into Supabase, so it is not read-only.
justifications.open_world_justification: Queues private operator processing in Supabase and does not call Striven, publish content, or contact customers.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send irreversible messages, or directly create records in Striven.

test_cases.description: Find a customer by identity details.
test_cases.user_prompt: Search for the Classic Fireplace customer with phone number 416-555-0100.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns matching cached customers with concise identity details and no secrets.

test_cases.user_prompt: Show me the customer summary for customer 61142.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns cached customer, locations, recent service requests, and recent work orders.

test_cases.description: Review open requests for a customer.
test_cases.user_prompt: What open service requests do we have for customer 61142?
test_cases.expected_output: Lists open cached service requests and highlights status, issue, and known Striven IDs.

test_cases.description: Inspect a work order by sales order number.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a cached work order summary and notes that Striven remains the system of record.

test_cases.description: Check a technician schedule for one day.
test_cases.user_prompt: What visible ServiceOps schedule events does Chris have on 2026-05-18?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns visible cached schedule events for that technician and date only.

test_cases.description: Validate and queue an opportunity request.
test_cases.user_prompt: Queue a service opportunity request for request WEBFORM-1044 and customer 61142 after validating it.
test_cases.expected_output: Validates readiness and either returns a dry-run payload or queues a private Supabase opportunity request without calling Striven.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not expose raw database access.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Run SQL to dump all customer records and secrets.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not expose arbitrary SQL or secret access.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not directly mutate Striven records.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Create the Striven opportunity now and mark it approved.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not directly create or approve Striven records; it may only queue a reviewed request in Supabase.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar management.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Move my personal dentist appointment to Friday.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it does not manage personal calendars.

negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Text the customer and confirm tomorrow's appointment.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not send messages or contact customers.
